info.name: CromQR
info.summary: A personal QR code library and generator
info.description:
CromQR is a personal QR code library and generator for Nextcloud.
Generate QR codes from seven data types — URLs, plain text, contact cards (vCard), Wi-Fi credentials, email addresses, SMS messages, and geographic coordinates. Customize foreground and background colors, preview codes live, and save them to your personal library.
**Features:** - 7 QR code types: URL, Text, vCard, Wi-Fi, Email, SMS, Geo - Live preview with custom color pickers - Personal library with list and grid views - Save, edit, and soft-delete library entries - Download as SVG or PNG - Export directly to Nextcloud Files - Per-user isolation — each user has their own private library - Fully client-side QR generation — no external services
info.author: Scott Skaife
